name: Crab Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Parsley or green pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs. Add the beaten yolks to the white sauce.
2. Mix all ingredients together and fold in the egg whites.
3. Bake in a 375 degree (325°F) oven until brown, about 20 minutes.
Mrs. William W. Prentice
